Friends,

**Illegal border crossing is at an all-time high.**

The moment I arrived at the border, I could hear the smugglers and coyotes heckling and yelling, "We're going to keep coming" at the border patrol.

I was the first person to take photos of the inhumane conditions in which the migrants are living. Immediately, a **Biden Administration official told me to delete the images...** If the Biden Administration believes there isn’t a crisis at the border, why are they trying to HIDE WHAT IS GOING ON?

**The humanitarian conditions at the border are appalling, and we have _Joe Biden to thank for this open invitation._ ** | [**PROTECT OUR BORDERS**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=1fc53bdbf5b4420fb0cecc5292ed4201&_e=55Q2Qc7hqnaeNB0gHVGiBDdxMdMBBRrgKTX6A3mz2VUrLNdUfP9ZegdlTqM2pDdRBDIbGw7lkk3FiVHP7Ym6WU4gD2ved6Jks_A5yREDnVitDUUlTNzZxBuN5g1_5lUoenQIFDJrr4TNPHtG2HXt3H-61vu7zq6_jE1kE52gbLqfpvNUEUdxELhSerDTtYIWkpx5loqrl1gxTdpjXdDpKU1aeLACmBYEMd5nruLAjHyNzVAvvGRSQ7FJh68QeOL1xrqRv69jcn2Ji42vAYaRbgDqbXRTZjzilVLl3UFHnvfuUp_h6xcI9t2ZW41WJab4_IwuB8FJ0Qf8EpW-Rxn1aJo4HcpzX4vLblUer-ZnuRfgLNvghCXHGvGidfz8zuWKL43SgjZtJLvzwcZrjNuEttJt4VrJ9sf2bYL0wujkH18f7qysCNx5Ac0kByRc6eSq1LNwsPKx4Flnn4XrPuTdM_5py4QEfNkDixz-LnZIBEkhjXOGBBDUuklXuYO7CyQk)

President Biden told immigrants to come to America, and now he is telling them to leave. **He caused this crisis, and now he must fix it.**

I sent a letter to Joe Biden encouraging him to go to the border. The President of the United States MUST TAKE ACTION. **[JOIN ME AND STEP UP TODAY](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=1fc53bdbf5b4420fb0cecc5292ed4201&_e=55Q2Qc7hqnaeNB0gHVGiBDdxMdMBBRrgKTX6A3mz2VUrLNdUfP9ZegdlTqM2pDdRBDIbGw7lkk3FiVHP7Ym6WU4gD2ved6Jks_A5yREDnVitDUUlTNzZxBuN5g1_5lUoenQIFDJrr4TNPHtG2HXt3H-61vu7zq6_jE1kE52gbLqfpvNUEUdxELhSerDTtYIWkpx5loqrl1gxTdpjXdDpKU1aeLACmBYEMd5nruLAjHyNzVAvvGRSQ7FJh68QeOL1xrqRv69jcn2Ji42vAYaRbgDqbXRTZjzilVLl3UFHnvd752SZua044vD0Y2BEQyKxpSVp54QND67v-tSOvne3hM40qHuqIsQRWNgkAWD9-RAafQP7NOLPcHxi0ECaJB8Igr7TrDSHUISlk5vYwGIjJzqYGUoumDj1RhvkVmJhWI4i0PrFvcdGieVKFObVacBmAa20OQyjZyQfwRLy7QSs9yJ5OJpsYxKfxICJyxjqqqQSymDH9ZEH2vcCAPvzkstA)** to send Joe Biden and his administration a message to clean up his mess...and fix the inhumane crisis he caused! Hi there,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign. But first, I'd like to take a minute to explain why your support is so crucial in this race.
From day one, we knew it would be a tough fight to keep this seat. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes -- a fraction of a percent -- and Republicans are already spending big to defeat me. Democrats have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, and you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to get the GOP back in power.
I say this because it's true: **every _single_ deadline is an important test of our campaign's momentum.** My team tells me we need to raise $25,000 from emails like this one by midnight Friday in order to push back against the GOP's misleading attacks. **Look, I 'm really counting on your help today:**

clean_body: "" "" Hi there -- For whatever reason, the response to Senator Hassan's email asking for help hitting our $25,000 goal was pretty lackluster. We're trying not to stress too much since we have until Friday to get there, but if every person reading this gave just $3, we'd feel a LOT better. "" Recent public polls have Maggie down and we don't want to think about how much wider that gap'll get if we fall short. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" \-----------Original Message----------- Hi there, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign. But first, I'd like to take a minute to explain why your support is so crucial in this race. From day one, we knew it would be a tough fight to keep this seat. I only won my last race by 1,017 votes -- a fraction of a percent -- and Republicans are already spending big to defeat me. Democrats have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, and you can bet that Mitch McConnell is doing whatever it takes to get the GOP back in power. I say this because it's true: every single deadline is an important test of our campaign's momentum. My team tells me we need to raise $25,000 from emails like this one by midnight Friday in order to push back against the GOP's misleading attacks. Look, I 'm really counting on your help today: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" I got into public service to take on tough fights and get results for the people of New Hampshire. I was proud to cast crucial votes in the Senate to save the Affordable Care Act and pass the American Rescue Plan. But now, I'm the Republicans' number one target. In a race as close as ours in a state as purple as New Hampshire, every dollar makes a tremendous difference -- and it could be the deciding factor between holding on to this vulnerable seat or losing it to Republicans. "" I hope you know how truly grateful I am to have you on my team. Thank you for being with me in this fight. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan ""

name: Bill Bryant
subject: Forge Long Term Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forge Washington
body:
Dear Friends,
1. THE WHY:

**Do you want to stop the legislature from constantly passing new taxes and more taxes?**
**Do you want to stop seeing heroin legalized?**
**Would you like our parks to be safe and free of needles where everyone, including families, can gather and kids can play?**
We need a Republican majority in the legislature to do those things. We need to elect Republican candidates statewide. **To do that, we need a plan**. Not a one-year plan or a plan to help certain candidates. We need a four-year plan to create a majority.
**You want to see that plan? ****ForgeWA has it.**
ForgeWA's board recently approved a plan that will strategically focus efforts to elect Republicans to the legislature in 2022 and 2024 and Republicans to statewide offices in 2024.
**That plan starts now--in 2021.**
We can't keep getting jazzed up about a campaign in July of the election year and think that we are going to win. We can't keep focusing attention on one candidate and think that will deliver the change we need. We need a plan that builds from the ground up and that runs over many years. ForgeWA has that plan. We're ready to get it going. We need your help to fund the plan.
**Want to see the plan?**
2. THE HOW:

We can't reveal all the data and analysis in a letter like this, but I can show you a bit. Take a look:
* ForgeWA's plan is designed to gain 220,000 more Republican votes in 2024.

We do that and we start winning. BUT, if we are to recapture the legislature,
we need those new votes in specific swing legislative districts.
* How do we do that? In 2021, we build a foundation in those districts in preparation for races in 2022 and 2024.
* Where are those districts? Many of them are in Snohomish County, so that is where ForgeWA is starting in 2021.

In Snohomish County, every area that is yellow or orange is a swing area where we could earn votes. There are local races in all of these yellow areas this year and good candidates are running in those races. This year, ForgeWA will put all of its resources into certain races in swing areas of Snohomish County.

We will elect people who want to curb government's hunger for more taxes and who will help communities reclaim their neighborhoods and parks. **AND ...**
* **in 2021, we will lay the groundwork in these critical areas for legislative victories in 2022 and 2024;**
* **in 2022 , ForgeWA will let organizations that elect legislative candidates take the lead;**
* **in 2023 , ForgeWA will be back implementing a similar plan on the Eastside of King County and in parts of Pierce County. Also in 2023, ForgeWA will elect responsible people to local government positions, _and do it in a way that sets us up for victory_** _ ****in 2024****_

This is the type of long-term plan and coordination between different organizations that we have needed for a very long time, and ForgeWA is now delivering it.
________________________________________________________________
3. THE WHAT

What ForgeWA needs is the money to execute the plan. Not a huge amount, but it is critical we get it now. Time is running out in 2021. Doing what needs to be done in Snohomish in 2021, and doing what needs to be done to lay the groundwork for 2022 and 2024 requires a budget of $400,000 over the next 24 months.
**We need $230,000 now to get started. **
I am writing to ask you to be a part of this long term plan. ForgeWA has spent months examining where we win, where we lose, why we're losing, where we need to build a farm team of candidates and a solid foundation for future years. What we need is the money to execute that plan.
**Donors have often told me they won 't give any more until there is a long term plan for winning. Well, here is that plan. Together, let's implement it.**

I am asking you to please [donate $10, $25, $50 or $500 dollars to help Forge launch its 2021-2024 plan.](http://link.i-d-pro.com/ls/click?upn=v2C7K-2F4H-2FYNxcsZshOGQWLEPc9SuYM6ZPGOEW1L-2FHn9oAtrUl6p9EhWz690oW0aHFbpg2iHH2213uzyuxfrJRg-3D-3DvOKD_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymg5B2Xdj8Tkq4QqrzMvs0P4-2BpNnXzEyn9YSvC-2Bypir18XsHALmMWiJn7cqgn5I6GBINhvy-2Ftewk3idkk3nPUzS43ngGKU-2BgkP3sVq1ff1uQQvgpEyM1lYbGAyKx2pnzh55sU-2B8AQUCV5KFhBFtkzbWVaqR8gZM-2Bra9YgDO8gpZXLLJULQtFBOrnHfvYC8HlbUVsqFtWfpPELudpzn8NBdtrx3OqR3xxMVSiAj1r4q38j5XVSXQe8LvfotLFt9pOykg-3D) The money will help elect local candidates in key swing districts, recruit candidates to run in 2022 and 2024, and begin developing the voter contact lists and tools in those swing districts that we will need to win in 2022 and 2024.
**If we want to win in 2024, we need to start today**.
That is why I am asking you to please contribute to ForgeWA today. There are no legal limits on how much you may contribute.
[CLICK HERE TO DONATE](http://link.i-d-pro.com/ls/click?upn=v2C7K-2F4H-2FYNxcsZshOGQWLEPc9SuYM6ZPGOEW1L-2FHn9oAtrUl6p9EhWz690oW0aHFbpg2iHH2213uzyuxfrJRg-3D-3DevAT_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymg5B2Xdj8Tkq4QqrzMvs0P4-2BpNnXzEyn9YSvC-2Bypir18XsHALmMWiJn7cqgn5I6GBINhvy-2Ftewk3idkk3nPUzS43ngGKU-2BgkP3sVq1ff1uQQuOIxOH52B3GTQWlhK2RB8bTj1sY-2BEZm2qHIA36-2FiC-2FWQ5ueQBhftPWd7IovWezuNooXIo-2FCZvLvq-2Fp2oR8xHJGTuq3BqOzKz9yDryWvRbOs5-2FqkbR9pFZrceQXJwKSVpYW4YFMID1-2FN5l2FOnLnoI8-3D)
This is your chance to contribute to a data-based,
long-term plan to start winning in Washington again.
You have always supported me in the past. This time I'm not asking you to support my campaign, **I am asking you to** _support our campaign_. I am asking you to be a part of a multi-year effort to build Republican majorities in the State House and State Senate and help restore fiscal sanity to Olympia.
We know what needs to be done. Please join me today in doing it.
Thank you for contributing to our future.
Onward,

Bill

Paid for by Forge Washington
P.O. Box 1875
Tacoma, WA 98401
* When required by law some of ForgeWA's largest donors' names might appear on printed material. Please inquire if you have questions.

If you would like to unsubscribe and stop receiving these emails [ click here ](http://link.i-d-pro.com/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFOWvSmO7IJll-2Bjy9VO59G8IpH4E3nu9-2F5oHANpITihpRG0wjcXMZoS2nFd0hNzZQmOF5QgYlSfg5GnFU8Kl9EMjnialuuRB81P5yR5lMLOrOD57ntzFw5vfomPa1Ciw3eHudVVEXfvWwWqKO2DxYyEDqFyK8gt1UZi-2FPWplR8GHf168b-2BQU2JmQzCS0Rnny8mCKG2dOoNTEhCdv-2FhGZQ79RZWGC6RfasCEubl56QvirqFTP-2BdPnh4iFHFvhkb6hCMQmMMHpiQPG102TZyAJUU-2B)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: She failed in WI... why promote her to D.C.?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Andrea Palm won't fix things. Wisconsin would know. Peter,I'm not sure why the Biden Administration would promote ANYONE from Tony Evers' circle to Washington, much less **Andrea Palm.** In case you don't remember _(Biden doesn't seem to),_ Andrea Palm was in charge of Wisconsin's Department of Health Services during its disastrous response to COVID. **[WE CAN'T IGNORE HER FAILURES AND MISSTEPS! ](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-r/)[JOIN ME - ](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-y/)[OPPOSE ANDREA PALM FOR HHS!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-j/)** [[ JOIN FITZGERALD ] - CLEAN UP THE SWAMP!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Here in Wisconsin, we've seen Andrea Palm's record of liberal failure in action.
* She implemented (and extended) Evers' **Safer at Home** program, the abusive overreach that was ultimately struck down by the WI Supreme Court. Her blatant disregard for the law CANNOT be ignored!
* She oversaw a vaccine rollout that was ranked **47th out of 50 states** during the early weeks of January.
* She **downplayed COVID deaths** in Wisconsin's long-term care facilities, which we're only now starting to realize the extent of.

Her actions destroyed small businesses, cost lives in nursing homes, and blatantly violated state law. _The high point of her tenure might have been her resignation. _The Senate needs to REJECT Andrea Palm. [Will you join me and send that message loud and clear?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-i/)-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-d/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-miktlyd-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-miktlyd-ahkdjtlkr-u/)

She implemented (and extended) Evers' Safer at Home program, the abusive overreach that was ultimately struck down by the WI Supreme Court. Her blatant disregard for the law CANNOT be ignored! She oversaw a vaccine rollout that was ranked 47th out of 50 states during the early weeks of January. She downplayed COVID deaths** in Wisconsin's long-term care facilities, which we're only now starting to realize the extent of. Her actions destroyed small businesses, cost lives in nursing homes, and blatantly violated state law. The high point of her tenure might have been her resignation. The Senate needs to REJECT Andrea Palm. Scott Fitzgerald Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 |

name: Dudley Brown
subject: Breaking: Biden announces gun control executive order!
body:
Dear Peter,

The nightmare scenario I have been warning gun owners about is underway.

_That 's right, President Biden is using executive action to force his gun control agenda on law-abiding Americans_.

We don't have a lot of time to act.

**[So before you read on, please take a moment to sign your"Stop Biden's Gun Ban" petition](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799862:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**?

Peter, you can rest assured that the National Association for Gun Rights will not stand for this assault on YOUR Second Amendment rights.

We have defeated Biden's gun control agenda before, and we will do it again.

_In 2013, when the Obama-Biden administration tried to force gun control on the American people, NAGR was there to rally the pro-gun grassroots in opposition_.

And thanks to the inspiring activism of our 4.5 million members and supporters, we defeated every single gun grab from Biden's agenda.

Which is precisely why Biden is resorting to executive action this time around.

He thinks he can sidestep the pro-gun grassroots if he bypasses Congress all together.

Well, Peter, Biden is terribly mistaken.

The gloves are off.

And let me be clear, Peter, any politician who sits idly by while the President tries to rip up our Constitution needs to be held accountable.

That's why it's vital pro-gun supporters like you send the politicians that message.

**[So please sign your"Stop Biden's Gun Ban" Petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799862:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**.

When we flood the D.C. swamp with hundreds of thousands of petitions from angry voters, the political class will have no choice but to hear our voice.

Of course taking on the President of the United States isn't cheap.

And while NAGR is prepared to dip into our emergency war chest, we are still going to need a massive influx of funds to make sure no stone goes unturned against Biden's executive orders.

**[So Peter, once you've signed the petition, please consider rushing us your most generous contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799862:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**.

_Whether it 's a contribution of **[$150](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799863:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)** , **[$100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799864:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)** , or **[$75](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799865:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)** , you can rest assured that your donation will be used to combat the assault on the Constitution_.

Even chipping in **[$15](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799866:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)** or **[$30](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799867:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)** will help us prepare for what Biden is going to throw at us.

Thanks in advance for your support, and I'll keep you updated as things progress.

**For Freedom,

Dudley Brown
President
National Association for Gun Rights**

P.S. Joe Biden is attempting to force his gun control agenda on law-abiding Americans using executive action.

Your National Association for Gun Rights is already launching our counter attack.

But we need you in the fight, Peter.

**[So if you have not already, please sign your"Stop Biden's Gun Ban" petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799862:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**.

**[And please consider chipping in to help us prepare for the incoming political fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799868:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**.

* * *
_**The National Association for Gun Rights, Inc. is a non-profit tax exempt advocacy organization under Section 501(c)4 of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to NAGR are not tax-deductible for IRS purposes. Not paid for or mailed at taxpayer expense. The National Association for Gun Rights ' mailing address is P.O. Box 1776, Loveland, Colorado 80539. They can be contacted toll-free at 1-877-405-4570. Its web address is [www.NationalGunRights.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57799869:WnOHZydKN:m:1:2202880964:A868FF05B3639D5FC86447D56D4B8C92:r)**_ _**Not produced or e-mailed at taxpayer expense.**_
* * *

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Asking directly for Terry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PfY43rKH6QHTTrhpmZo6Sr_aHTRrbSczOsOmdh8r8kE=/VyBzSzwV9CiU_jIjDxwCShSBqORtJgin76VbTbMKmTY=?refcode=20210407_RN_TRM)
---
Friend, The pandemic has brought unprecedented challenges to Virginia. I'm proud of everything my administration has done to lead the Commonwealth through this hard time -- but let's be clear: even after I leave office, Virginia's work to keep our citizens safe and our economy strong is far from over. Friend, I need to know that our next Governor will be ready for that challenge on day one. **That 's why I'm endorsing my friend, Terry McAuliffe, to be the next Governor of Virginia. [Will you join me in supporting Terry by contributing to his campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/PfY43rKH6QHTTrhpmZo6Sr_aHTRrbSczOsOmdh8r8kE=/VyBzSzwV9CiU_jIjDxwCShSBqORtJgin76VbTbMKmTY=?refcode=20210407_RN_TRM)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PfY43rKH6QHTTrhpmZo6Sr_aHTRrbSczOsOmdh8r8kE=/Q49pkdMKrpf3PlHkl0ACCDeyI_k4UicljzSJf7__mNE=?refcode=20210407_RN_TRM) We don't have to guess what Terry will do because we've already seen him in action. Whether it's restoring voting rights for 173,000 disenfranchised Virginians (more than any Governor in history) or standing as a brick wall against Republican attacks on reproductive rights, Terry is a courageous leader who will deliver for Virginia families. Think about all of the progress we've made over the past eight years. Because grassroots Democrats like you stood behind us, we flipped the General Assembly, expanded Medicaid, and made historic investments in Virginia's infrastructure and education. We can keep our progress going, but history says it's not going to be easy, friend. Why? In Virginia politics, the party that wins the White House typically loses the Governor's mansion the following year. It's just a fact. With Virginia Republicans doubling down on Donald Trump's agenda of voter suppression, racism, and hate, we can't let that happen in 2021. I know Terry has what it takes to stop these extremists, and with our help, I know he'll do it. [**With progress on the line and extremism in Virginia on the rise, can I count on you to stand with me by supporting Terry McAuliffe today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/PfY43rKH6QHTTrhpmZo6Sr_aHTRrbSczOsOmdh8r8kE=/VyBzSzwV9CiU_jIjDxwCShSBqORtJgin76VbTbMKmTY=?refcode=20210407_RN_TRM) Take care, Ralph

| Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/PfY43rKH6QHTTrhpmZo6Sr_aHTRrbSczOsOmdh8r8kE=/zSl38Go3c_7x4N8bDjSzFFYzWHi0pRakGoQS7V-OYpM=) |

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: What we’re up against
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pA77BbB7zqAhixGyNg-gBWSX288dwLiacl8UH32RWQ4=/FHiUziChNhtjbr_rSKQ4qa6axgQPx-IOWv9UzqvHDTM=?refcode=040821)
| | Friend, This pandemic has been hard for everyone, but some Minnesotans have been hit harder than others. This week, House DFLers [introduced a budget](https://act.myngp.com/el/pA77BbB7zqAhixGyNg-gBWSX288dwLiacl8UH32RWQ4=/_ceEqClMmj5LpiKsVL49L67RXkenaEdohieu3PHDjx4=) that prioritizes those most impacted by COVID-19 -- students, workers, families, and small businesses. Our House DFL Majority is critical to making sure the state budget reflects our values. If we had lost in November, Republicans would have full control of the Minnesota Legislature. [**_I know it 's a non-election year, but I am writing today to ask you to make a contribution to the Minnesota House DFL._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pA77BbB7zqAhixGyNg-gBWSX288dwLiacl8UH32RWQ4=/FHiUziChNhtjbr_rSKQ4qa6axgQPx-IOWv9UzqvHDTM=?refcode=040821) Your donation helps us start to organize for 2022 and the more time we have, the better. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [**Make a donation**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pA77BbB7zqAhixGyNg-gBWSX288dwLiacl8UH32RWQ4=/FHiUziChNhtjbr_rSKQ4qa6axgQPx-IOWv9UzqvHDTM=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=040821121EOM3) _ __ __You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Voter suppression in Georgia, discrimination bills in Arkansas, overturned COVID-19 responses in Wisconsin -- this is what we are up against, this is what the House DFL Majority is blocking. And here at home, Senate Republicans have introduced a budget that puts those who've done well during the pandemic first. We hope we can continue to earn your support. We will keep you updated as we work to pass our budget. Thank you, Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives **P.S. The Political Contribution Refund Program has been renewed for 2021. If you are a Minnesota resident, make your refundable donation of $50 (or $100 per couple) today.** _ _ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/pA77BbB7zqAhixGyNg-gBWSX288dwLiacl8UH32RWQ4=/FHiUziChNhtjbr_rSKQ4qa6axgQPx-IOWv9UzqvHDTM=?refcode=040821)
---

subject: Join Us: Build Back Blue

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
Under Bill Lee’s leadership and the GOP supermajority: more than half a dozen rural hospitals have closed, unemployment reached an all time high in Tennessee, and student proficiencies reached an all time low. Tennessee must elect leaders who will build back our public healthcare system, build back our economy, and build back our public schools. It’s time to BUILD BACK BLUE.
On April 22nd we’re kicking off our Build Back Blue initiative to take back the state legislature and defeat Bill Lee, you’re invited. This is our first fundraiser of the initiative and will feature speakers from across the state, musical performances, branding reveal, and a question and answer session with TNDP staff. We’ll also premiere our first Build Back Blue digital ads and launch our merchandise store.
We cannot build back blue without you and your support. Purchase your ticket now! [https://tndp.org/kickoff/]

Hendrell Remus

body:
End the restrictions. End the mandates.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==) [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==) _Texas is onto something, Friend._

For more than two weeks straight, COVID numbers in Texas have DECREASED after Governor Abbott lifted the state's mask mandate, among other restrictions.

Now, Texans are enjoying restaurants and shopping at businesses with 100% capacity **while the number of COVID cases in the state CONTINUES to fall. **

[ _**So, what are you waiting for, Governor DeWine?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==)
**End the restrictions. End the mandates.**
| **[**OPEN OHIO NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==)**
---

Texas, Florida, and other states lifting coronavirus restrictions are setting the example for the rest of the country as they give Americans their freedom back.

_**Ohioans deserve to be given their freedoms back too.[That's why I am once again calling on Governor DeWine to OPEN OHIO NOW. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==)**_

**[**OPEN OHIO NOW**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QzrCgUcY_55Z3SwIQjuvZ3CtvbRhu-cS68Yz3HHYgefRZbvB1bOwy-esnf7l9c0J8hRXkOYg6U7YmSwTlGGGwxaGHlQQGp_G0-0s-_WmnUQ4qQCUxZNKLxLgp_2qiAvIcmQ_O3R6Lwt2y4eCXklGL79sUKCk9NbzYKuVe7lHu_O75d57pL-9sd1-1F_1qmQPQ10Oeg3T54f-QI-5e-Ls_JS9tw9J37M33MwuteI57K50Hns7jVu2y7ekPzgnIdpkKlS3uDy0o57hnMurclTBOfGtv4jwCpn2tE-U5k1R9L-9LtoWAUQ8OfIcYYfZh9H3pCEwiiB4xPBTVxiCyqtRxX9y5_wjuQJQk57gXWOOZB66UObv2z2eflPhmEVs3r_ar_Z1TJ7wJXs=&c=78RTgoEbIxHS7YGdCC8xIAtl4MgQK5ILC69kOl70iWom2m6gAq9Nfw==&ch=lwHb4MaiP1HLipgLWg_GAStN1RGAf8pwi0YjuwtZCfUdYads_18i0Q==)**

**CALL TO ACTION**
* * *
---
Here we GO YALL!
UPDATE via HB6 Action Request:
WOW... things are moving fast! Our guys in the House need your help with HB 6, the election integrity bill that was heard in committee last week. It appears that the Democrats have launched a 'text campaign' to their base urging them to oppose HB6, which may be brought up in committee for a vote tomorrow. We have the votes in the House Election Committee to pass it through but there are many Republicans who have not signed on to it and/or have not committed to vote FOR it when it is brought to the floor. ACTION REQUEST:
• Call Speaker Phelan to let him know how important election integrity is to you as a Texas Republican voter. Ask him to help usher HB 6 to the House floor for a vote soon.
https://house.texas.gov/members/speaker/ • If your Texas House Representative is NOT listed as an author or coauthor for HB 6, CALL him/her to ask them to do so along with getting a commitment to vote FOR HB 6 when it is brought up on the floor. HB 6: https://capitol.texas.gov/BillLookup/History.aspx...
TX House Representatives contact links:
https://capitol.texas.gov/Members/Members.aspx?Chamber=H HERE are talking points if you should need them.
https://docs.google.com/.../1EqNa_-HBkc1qXF.../edit... THANK these Representatives currently signed on to HB 6:
Authors - Cain | Schofield | Klick | Clardy | Jetton
Coauthors - Anderson | Ashby | Bell, Cecil | Bell, Keith | Biedermann | Bonnen | Buckley | Burrows | Capriglione | Cason | Cyrier | Dean | Ellzey | Frank | Goldman | Harless | Harris | Hefner | Holland | Hull | King, Phil | Krause | Lambert | Landgraf | Leach | Leman | Metcalf | Middleton | Murphy | Murr | Noble | Oliverson | Parker | Patterson | Paul | Rogers | Sanford | Schaefer | Shaheen | Slawson | Smith | Spiller | Stephenson | Stucky | Swanson | Thompson, Ed | Tinderholt | Toth | Vasut | White | Wilson After 8:00 a.m. (April 8th) morning, if you can’t make it to Austin to testify FOR HB 2546 that is being heard in committee, please login in and leave your position through the Public Comment Portal before the hearing is adjourned.
https://comments.house.texas.gov/home... Update from the Senate:
SB 7 and SB 155, two of our Election Integrity Legislative Priority bills, have both passed through this chamber and were sent to the House yesterday. All eyes are on the Texas House right now!
Finally, but of utmost importance, Chairman West had appointed an Election Integrity Committee for the Republican Party of Texas during our first SREC meeting after convention in 2020. This committee has vetted and approved legislation that aligns with our Platform and mission to ensure free and fair elections in Texas. Please join them in advocating for these bills that can be found HERE! https://docs.google.com/.../1MCtu7pfkSNGWqLuWTRc1.../edit...
Thank you for your vigilance!

name: Chuck Rocha, Nuestro PAC
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nuestro PAC
body:
For those of you who aren’t as familiar, I served as a Senior Advisor for Bernie Sanders’ presidential campaign, where we absolutely dominated the other campaigns with Latino voters.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27388989/279936594/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0NjA5M2M1LTlkOTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmIUgOgJcEH837GyAMHYSnCI1kWoJ50ONdzKAzhQfwk=)

Friends -
In a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to help Nuestro PAC make early investments to organize, persuade and mobilize Latino voters we lost in 2020.
If you know our history and are ready to chip in, use this link:
**[Make a contribution -- of any amount you can afford -- to Nuestro PAC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27388990/279936595/1999088365?refcode=210408-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0NjA5M2M1LTlkOTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmIUgOgJcEH837GyAMHYSnCI1kWoJ50ONdzKAzhQfwk=)**
For those of you who aren’t as familiar, I served as a Senior Advisor for Bernie Sanders’ presidential campaign, where we absolutely dominated the other campaigns with Latino voters.
That was my job. And we did it well.
When the presidential primary ended, I founded Nuestro PAC which made history by becoming the largest independent Latino super PAC in the country. We spent $10 million running bilingual ads in 8 states.
Ad testing showed our creative had more of an impact in moving voters than any other presidential independent expenditures’ ads.
But, frankly, a lot of funding went to the same old consultants instead of our team with the experience moving Latino voters through organizing and culturally competent ads written, edited and produced by Latinos.
No surprise, Democrats lost ground with Latino voters in a big way.
We’re going to change that this cycle, and our work starts in a special election in Texas’s 6th congressional district with candidate Jana Lynne Sanchez who is just a few weeks away from the May 1st primary.
This is our opportunity to do things right. Help us get in front of Latino voters and let them know about this opportunity to flip this seat from Red to Blue. If you do, we’re going to win:
**[Can you please make a contribution -- or any amount you can afford -- to Nuestro PAC today and help us flip TX-6 from red by blue by helping us elect Jana Lynne Sanchez to the seat?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27388991/279936596/1999088365?refcode=210408-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0NjA5M2M1LTlkOTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmIUgOgJcEH837GyAMHYSnCI1kWoJ50ONdzKAzhQfwk=)**
Thank you for chipping in. It means a lot.
In Solidarity,
Chuck Rocha
** **
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27388992/279936597/1999088365?refcode=210408-full&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0NjA5M2M1LTlkOTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmIUgOgJcEH837GyAMHYSnCI1kWoJ50ONdzKAzhQfwk=)********

name: Taking the Hill PAC
subject: This PAC fights fascists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

She has called for Democrats to "hang" and "face death." But today, Q-Anon adherent and rabid conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene revealed that [_**she raised more than $3.3 million last quarter**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/XDvPemQJc430R2nRlwqRuaINcXFt_xXBTGMcnF9MJFI=/1ATLweINzf2peFMRjnJhTeXClnx1UEeJoPaJ59aev-U=?amp=1) for her re-election campaign. That is a **staggering, disgusting** amount of money to support her fascist, racist, anti-Semitic ideology.

But let's be clear: **Marjorie Taylor Greene isn 't an exception; she is the norm.** Republicans are learning that if they spew the most hateful rhetoric against their fellow Americans, they can raise boatloads of campaign cash in a system that rewards cruelty and lies at the expense of decency and dignity.

**We 've had about enough of that.**

Here at Taking the Hill, our mission is to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress. This cycle, we are focused both on our candidates and on winning back persuadable veteran and military family voters in districts like Marjorie Taylor Greene's by having conversations with our sisters and brothers in arms - and their families - to appeal to the same values that first drew us all to military service.

**But we cannot do this work alone.** $3.3 million is a lot to fight back against. [_**This week, any contribution you make will be matched 100% and go directly towards supporting candidates of integrity and persuading real voters. Can you chip in to help us fight fascists like Marjorie Taylor Greene today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/XDvPemQJc430R2nRlwqRuaINcXFt_xXBTGMcnF9MJFI=/GxbzZTxSKrWfUTMaURYEWNpdD-XU2ftvolsi1EQeFJ0=)

[_**This PAC fights fascists.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/XDvPemQJc430R2nRlwqRuaINcXFt_xXBTGMcnF9MJFI=/GxbzZTxSKrWfUTMaURYEWNpdD-XU2ftvolsi1EQeFJ0=) Help us _**[restore a majority of integrity](https://act.myngp.com/el/XDvPemQJc430R2nRlwqRuaINcXFt_xXBTGMcnF9MJFI=/GxbzZTxSKrWfUTMaURYEWNpdD-XU2ftvolsi1EQeFJ0=)**_ to the U.S. Congress today.

In solidarity,

The team at **Taking the Hill**

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/XDvPemQJc430R2nRlwqRuaINcXFt_xXBTGMcnF9MJFI=/aMOqZiCdt4DLh6DuuS-LP2h6p14GdmPCk-69N2EqNYE=).

name: Martin (Team Young)
subject: Young Kim’s seat is not safe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi was completely blindsided when we flipped this district from blue to red. Now, she and her Far left base are out to take it back.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001afWQjDb01XcuU-iWO8FLC9f6rxnMsdqt-y3yLp9Vg7br8A83yiyPAtadCTXEJ59Nxg7YxAABZO2hMEerr66tjpyuEY_xhs0IZZAtPaPBv3JR-rWosgK3Q56bowAdf6_f_q-5R61La7SnRiJy1ePi8dVPnVYmdn-UI_s2bfhmEOUr0s72fVL_AiJR-7ifMqJIXl4uw3Z_YL53NMoxgkuOhTaI1BHaBf-03iixX76lXsY6g-IXwdSWbd8FCn6vgs7glP7rA3PRT6KaBiG4Efd2Qc4ooFRBT-W0hN7mXrPqakNEJJA-Qlzq9gXp5LpvsNhkBj5kMQk_tOx09rMcayGGm9qZOo3dgMyD6Mz-Wr-sjZxLGIoSAXkoQbSy1p-F_9DsnpzcJEYPn4pfwYePhnZJIBjG6_pcPTB0-jiWfHQzHqWoF3rfCYh3kKFIynNz4dzk&c=AZkzzhIajneVQS8ovoZBedxIFskLAA8Kk3LpRQMOoleXzOEY0xSV4g==&ch=VIZxoFcI6ksYZrUvpw8jNARp3uuIoz52WXxLmRPqEUfcih1MjL_EFQ==)
---
Friend, it was bad enough hearing Nancy Pelosi and the Washington Democrats raised **$11.5 MILLION** in a single month. Then it got so much worse we heard they had **$26 MILLION** on hand to use against conservatives AT ANY GIVEN MOMENT. _Young Kim 's seat is NOT safe._ Nancy Pelosi was completely blindsided when we flipped this district from blue to red. subject: Meeting with Pres. Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.

name: Team Marco
subject: Cancel "Cancel Culture"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Friend,

Did you see Marco Rubio's letter to Commissioner Manfred calling out his hypocrisy for pulling the MLB All Star Game out of Georgia? Read an excerpt below:
_Dear Commissioner Manfred:_ __ _I write to ask you whether you intend to maintain your membership at Augusta National Golf Club. As you are well aware, the exclusive members-only club is located in the State of Georgia._ __ _Last week, you "decided that the best way to demonstrate our values as a sport is by relocating this year's All-Star Game" from Atlanta because of Georgia's revised election law. It is a decision that will have a bigger impact on countless small and minority owned businesses in and around Atlanta, than the new election law ever will. And one that reeks of hypocrisy._ __ _Will Major League Baseball now end its engagement with nations that do not hold elections at all like China and Cuba? Will you end your lucrative financial relationship with Tencent, a company with deep ties to the Communist Party and actively helps the Chinese Government hunt down and silence political dissidents? _
The sad part is that the new location is Colorado, a state that has many of the same policies that the left has thrown a fit about for the past month in Georgia.

The real reason is because Left wing organizations like _MLB, Coca-Cola, and Delta_ are out to cancel conservatives, but meanwhile, they partner with Communist China, who denies basic freedoms to their citizens. Luckily, Senator Rubio has been fighting this nonsense. But he can't do this alone, will **YOU** join him in this fight?

---

name: Rick Scott Chairman
subject: Democrats are using loopholes to DESTROY the filibuster!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We can't stop Schumer alone, we need your help and help from millions of Americans who understand the damage Schumer's socialist agenda will cause.

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.
Friend,

With Joe Biden's bloated $2 TRILLION infrastructure package on deck to be introduced in the Senate this month, the filibuster is America's last line of defense to kill the bill.

**The filibuster - which ensures the Senate operates democratically - has been under fire as Democrats seek to eliminate every supposed fair and protective measure they themselves put in place.** They fought FOR the filibuster and now they're hellbent on eliminating it, along with eliminating YOUR say in your government. **This is simply hypocritical.** [**Help Senate Republicans stop Democrats from dismantling democracy!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210408_TY.100609_rick-scott-chairman_t1056312-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210408_democrats-are-using-loopholes-to-destroy-the-filibuster)

But Chuck Schumer doesn't even have his party united around him on this issue, as multiple Democratic Senators have come out in support of keeping the filibuster in place.

That's not stopping Chuck Schumer though. [**Pledge a donation to help Republican retake the Senate Majority and stop Schumer!**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210408_TY.100609_rick-scott-chairman_t1056312-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210408_democrats-are-using-loopholes-to-destroy-the-filibuster)

We can't stop Schumer alone, we need your help and help from millions of Americans who understand the damage Schumer's socialist agenda will cause. **Can we count on your support to keep the Senate fair and democratic?**

Thank you for your support,

Rick Scott

**[**DONATE TO RETAKE THE SENATE MAJORITY**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/help-take-back-the-senate/?sc=pem8815m13m&utm_campaign=20210408_TY.100609_rick-scott-chairman_t1056312-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210408_democrats-are-using-loopholes-to-destroy-the-filibuster)**

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: Quick Question
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b5b306def4&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| | Friend,
I have a quick question for you: do you think it’s too much to ask to require a photo ID to vote?

For what it’s worth, I sure don’t think so. I have always believed strongly that protecting our elections from fraud is one of the most fundamental roles of government. In the Iowa Senate, I was proud to support Iowa’s photo voter ID law.

Voter ID laws protect our elections from fraud. Period.

But this week, we’ve seen a coordinated attack by liberals against these common sense state laws. Liberals, led by Nancy Pelosi, are pushing through a radical plan known as HR1 that would block voter ID laws and put the federal government in charge of our elections.

Then, earlier this week, after they passed an election security law in Georgia, liberals from across the country, including President Biden, have launched vicious and false attacks against the law. Their attacks have led to corporate boycotts and even the removal of the Major League Baseball All Star Game from Georgia. It’s truly madness.

Folks, we saw them try to overturn the results in Iowa’s 2nd Congressional district race just weeks ago. We cannot let them nationalize our elections with dangerous policies that leave our elections vulnerable.

Join our fight for election security today!
---

subject: URGENT: We need to pick up the pace!

body:
The Republican primary is over. Now, several very competitive races against Democrats are set. Unfortunately, the Democrats are out-pacing us [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=14844d4e3f87446f9908af6a3e670ac8&_e=g74hZzjuPadOt1Db6jGgXQlzsg3233z2vAugwx0i1e-8axGSfqsAjUgmIMGR7bT5aiw4n1_IeD6jLXN37-Ulnwjn-C7BzSbE2C8HtGkJEW7-sU9kWcsJF8gpY1FW9t_6PBoBPFtwP_TtMcXvKgOi-dF1yER1rJFLUpSCMunMRZChjL7UQhsBlfKhri1gSGdNnCN9OeXjq5X6_3_AMjvwTKKJjRaqDCyAXLXCdcy2gd_v6oirlabYd9k9ExdOfqxHXxhAAycH-J1wu1DVVtt9LPXHoIQps_jYC54AGwcX_-jxgvSsFUUU3KhOtnpKUv1rQmqhv1ksSbPgyUvuSzOuKw%3D%3D) Fellow Mississippian, The Republican primary is over. Now, several very competitive races against Democrats are set. **Unfortunately, the Democrats are out-pacing us in fundraising!** More money in their bank account means more funds going to their races.

name: Team Cammack
subject: Cancel 'Cancel Culture'
body:
There is more at stake than Mr. Potato Head
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u2bcJ8OA-zaDnp9nQoI6LVcccPqSQld36GJSoCdpbBPb8800jcdysHpMvZ5pDFbMEnXFl3Av_7fdtcxEkqlrVVtrdRsHZp0GKzJS6-z4eEhaSAWLcZujeHoJ_hgm12xy1XBmOs3gaTxVWnRtgiSuZyV84atXdzK4Ng6yS_K4Q_hT5vWEGSEeEbHN8w4GvgW6&c=1fHSXgNIrbHB0ONXh0Pbt4OsuOdBqlHMGSDYXHlIlwf3x8WuW11Fvg==&ch=rk9qDu660RYAWk5Upye5u5Tj7KIuAhw-mYotCjXny7KwjSNmiAXsyQ==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
What do J.K Rowling, George Washington, and Dr. Seuss have in common?
They have all been targets of "Cancel Culture," and according to the 'woke' politics of our times, the left has tried to officially ostracize them from our culture.

Thank you for your support, Peter. Unfortunately, radicals like Susan Wild aren’t interested in bipartisan solutions.... It’s heartbreaking that children and families are suffering due to failed leadership and open-border policies in Washington. We can do better–we must do better, and I need you to join me in holding the Radical-Left accountable. Thank you for supporting our campaign to end the partisan games in Washington and bring straightforward, pragmatic solutions back to the House of Representatives. I’m so grateful to have you on board! Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Joe Biden's big announcement
body:
#

Friends -- Did you see the news?
**This morning, President Biden announced a slate of executive orders to jumpstart the fight against gun violence. Some of the actions include:**
1\. Increased regulation of ghost guns and devices like the arm brace used in the Boulder shooting.
2\. Guidance for states to implement extreme risk laws.
3\. Annual reports from ATF on illegal firearms trafficking for the first time in 20 years.
We're so thrilled that President Biden is taking these actions, they are a big first step in the right direction.
We knew when he was elected that he would be a strong advocate for gun safety, and these actions show his commitment to making our communities safer.
President Biden is fulfilling his promise and taking immediate action to prevent gun violence. But we still need congressional action to ensure our long-term safety.
**Which is why today we 're calling on the Senate to follow the president's lead and we're hoping you will take a moment to join us:**
[**Sign on today and call on the Senate to follow the President 's lead on gun safety. Together, we can urge Congress to act and save countless lives.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee17b/78fba3aa/631a7df3/50aada24/1749781505/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/presidential-gun-safety?source=em210408-1-full")
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee17b/78fba3aa/631a7df3/50aada24/1749781505/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/presidential-gun-safety?source=em210408-1-full")**
It is a testament to President Biden and Vice President Harris's commitment to gun safety that they have made this issue a priority while navigating the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.
We want to show them that their commitment is meaningful to so many Americans who have been calling out for change for too long.
So take a moment right now to join us by adding your name and let's use this monumental moment to put pressure on Congress to act and save lives.
Thank you for all that you do
Team Giffords
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee17b/78fba3aa/631a7df3/50aada24/1749781505/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDgtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://action.giffords.org/page/signup/presidential-gun-safety?source=em210408-1-full")**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee17b/78fba3aa/631a7df3/50aada27/1749781505/VEsC/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

Mitch McConnell has been recruiting his hand-picked candidate to run against me, Republicans are already on the air with ads attacking me, and back-to-back polls show us down.
Now, it's early in the race and we still have time to turn things around, but the truth is that I need your help -- right now -- to do it. We're working toward a $25,000 fundraising goal for tomorrow at midnight, and we're not even halfway there.

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: California is FAILING our most vulnerable students
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Vulnerable ESL students may never recover from the school closures. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/5c1852c6a6350123c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, _Gavin Newsom has failed Californians on so many levels that some days, it’s hard to keep track._ One of the worst travesties in California under Newsom’s watch has been the school closures — especially when it comes to minority students who were already underserved and struggling. Just take a look at this recent headline in the Los Angeles Times: [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/687759e8186be425c3d6b838967d376c/34943) The article points out that non native English speakers are not faring well with online learning. With more than 1.2 million students (nearly 20%) considered to be English learners in California — _we have a major problem on our hands._ Martha Hernandez, the director of Californians Together, a nonprofit that advocates for English learners, called it “an educational pandemic.” She said, “We already had issues of an achievement gap, opportunity gaps, lack of access, lack of equity. Now that’s just exacerbated, and it will be a huge challenge. It will have a big impact for many, many years.” **Californians have suffered too long under the failed leadership of Gavin Newsom and one-party rule in Sacramento.** We need to start putting our kids FIRST, and make sure that all students have access to the best education we can offer. I’m ready to lead the charge for a better tomorrow in California. All students deserve a chance at a future. As your next governor, I’ll make sure they get it. Sincerely,
Kevin Faulconer [**Donate >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/c813f14e1b8c492cc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/b9837015c4927e85c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/c72dca9c18fcb249c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a8bc71c1085a66fe/5a3f0d8b9c80f582c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: Vulnerable ESL students may never recover from the school closures. Read more >> Peter, Gavin Newsom has failed Californians on so many levels that some days, it’s hard to keep track. One of the worst travesties in California under Newsom’s watch has been the school closures — especially when it comes to minority students who were already underserved and struggling. Just take a look at this recent headline in the Los Angeles Times: The article points out that non native English speakers are not faring well with online learning. With more than 1.2 million students (nearly 20%) considered to be English learners in California — we have a major problem on our hands. Martha Hernandez, the director of Californians Together, a nonprofit that advocates for English learners, called it “an educational pandemic.” She said, “We already had issues of an achievement gap, opportunity gaps, lack of access, lack of equity. Now that’s just exacerbated, and it will be a huge challenge. It will have a big impact for many, many years.” Californians have suffered too long under the failed leadership of Gavin Newsom and one-party rule in Sacramento. We need to start putting our kids FIRST, and make sure that all students have access to the best education we can offer. I’m ready to lead the charge for a better tomorrow in California. All students deserve a chance at a future. As your next governor, I’ll make sure they get it. Sincerely, Kevin Faulconer | | | | ---|---|--- id:2021-03-29-19:44:46:878t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second
"Sponsored Message"

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=20f88407841740f9b84e949ce1f16c04&_e=ascml8o0tHEPRVN8qVo0Thw_FXC7B2_bd2XP1Ymp6pLLkFxNQXNNPgJaPrV4gs79QlCKFhdkiebVQLJBWPY6tivyoGJZ6rHFTAq9QlHZUNpuNxyEoxxZSETIeX4XwOgrnEeELQnXIxWBFiPj0GO8HNDzAvycxxGe1m_n4XC8UbtuXCPL3YYSgto8ymWFaylc9gcaE6JvKsl8sa1ghzE65JFPJQgh5EjyBMT6s0VvxLYCdndKUxKNeXoG-mz3jUVt2kTyR47-DZjYG_y7f05VJsT6Oa9kxGX78ds4nvD7DNEGjoOgorx-I49JewpdV1EIL3dSdIAgIhcnJyEnCHV8aAaFAS_6t7RPngGNKtsIJS94B4KhATA4zMEW295CbTTANPxihLdIpKny91XIB1Er1A%3D%3D) Dear Friend of the Constitution,
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.
Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty.
We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.
Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below?
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=20f88407841740f9b84e949ce1f16c04&_e=ascml8o0tHEPRVN8qVo0Thw_FXC7B2_bd2XP1Ymp6pLLkFxNQXNNPgJaPrV4gs79QlCKFhdkiebVQLJBWPY6tivyoGJZ6rHFTAq9QlHZUNpuNxyEoxxZSETIeX4XwOgrnEeELQnXIxWBFiPj0GO8HNDzAvycxxGe1m_n4XC8UbtuXCPL3YYSgto8ymWFaylcqHCCTEKvoatjcGLjNY5r-HktNnJUIcQ-E3NLQukRN-OdNIrAgz47sqbesLfZx9GfyiDF8VKlUOBHp2DKSsuJRW151SmrvhZOiwvuyqZi2vph3eOPx54608PEeN-NMotOSr0QX-Al9IjWNgkbDVY0prxuNVj-_y8feCuNcpHUgXV1uCdCN8s-SAZqejlh-lq5IpKEd4gVKvFeoCOV4J3EiQ%3D%3D "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")**
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment.
There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**.
Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844.
Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment.
As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.”
This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.
This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example...
Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.
Why?
The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body.
Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America.
**But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.**
That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
And this work continues today.
That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=20f88407841740f9b84e949ce1f16c04&_e=ascml8o0tHEPRVN8qVo0Thw_FXC7B2_bd2XP1Ymp6pLLkFxNQXNNPgJaPrV4gs79QlCKFhdkiebVQLJBWPY6tivyoGJZ6rHFTAq9QlHZUNpuNxyEoxxZSETIeX4XwOgrnEeELQnXIxWBFiPj0GO8HNDzAvycxxGe1m_n4XC8UbtuXCPL3YYSgto8ymWFaylcpwaZYMBUT1agr2j7CSpBCsPUhCVqowkuoTiR_vR3DcnOc0c8qn_hBwDvEN_rLiuPbpu8sRUpancWsloqK6KERU2x9M2VcQcvr9Iif4tE0qEP13ewXaxfRV3ngn87fDpFFRhMMhTN3m4Tlb90d6THPvQ9-9kBYAWBAfF5AyBMrnFl5wkgU04IQDQB7uLI71860P9ndvzWsFw07fce0v2hpQ%3D%3D)**
We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”
Do you agree? I hope so.
This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today.
As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.
Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
It also means your gift really matters.
**Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.**
After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today.
And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you.
This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited!
Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.**
Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you!
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=20f88407841740f9b84e949ce1f16c04&_e=ascml8o0tHEPRVN8qVo0Thw_FXC7B2_bd2XP1Ymp6pLLkFxNQXNNPgJaPrV4gs79QlCKFhdkiebVQLJBWPY6tivyoGJZ6rHFTAq9QlHZUNpuNxyEoxxZSETIeX4XwOgrnEeELQnXIxWBFiPj0GO8HNDzAvycxxGe1m_n4XC8UbtuXCPL3YYSgto8ymWFaylcVs5aVrP4L_vPG8gs0iGfRHHlCPPsvfiikIZyl8QpKjaB3Y8O8xeLmX4EmMmGt-KCFrIA7tXbVAN9dlQwHSbiHW02DXcIwKdTCRFqJTR-hbG7Ux8GPdNu1DRlDZlYIzWKXOjgOQzqr5PkqtdlWnV1UWQ9TzQpfTXdNmgkyHVfahwBhIx_pDM7MU38G8IWsFpMDJd1i3JDLAiXlmdP9OjtJg%3D%3D)**

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: This is David vs. Goliath
body:
Today, President Biden announced a number of very problematic gun
control measures which will very likely require me to go to Court.Dear
Peter,
Today, from the Rose Garden, President Biden announced a number of
very problematic gun control measures which will very likely require
me to go to Court.
According to the Hill newspaper, Biden has “directed the Justice
Department to propose rules making homemade ‘ghost guns’ subject
to background checks.”
He is also proposing “red flag” legislation” for states and
is “asking Justice to RECLASSIFY PISTOLS modified with stabilizer
braces to be subject to the National Firearms Act.”
Biden is taking these actions at the same time he is nominating a
rabid gun-control advocateto head the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco,
Firearms and Explosives.
Rest assured, West Virginia and other attorneys general will not
allow the federal government to run roughshod over our gun rights.
In the upcoming weeks, be on the lookout for our many actions to
Defend America from Biden/Pelosi overreach. We need your voice and
support as we take on the forces of the far-left and they try to
portray their actions as “reasonable.”
This is yet another David v. Goliath fight!
http://tracking.teammorrisey.com/tracking/click?d=JH1zakVaNdTLlek_IjR2GmxiM-NqbvLOgWZBcu0Fsb3i96crsRA4ZSOY8TIz_J8x07CiWgVwmTAa3Ec0y-x6ayXXsj6wE5Uha8gvRQHjVyXeZ0FJX6pWME_FuCzxVlcR-42w_NELYnYpUisnXDsLmYC3FIDsnITx6F4KYhIDyaN3lDauHUqiRl2-ZX4JJuc5BPQthG5Bnv9BFLEq4sLLw8V6YmCYi7qJ-tdlfolLCUd0ABetSaGgwFscbN1HxH8XJmy9jZuu0pocgWTKTtDnI541
Keep the faith,
Patrick Morrisey
West Virginia Attorney General
PS— If you would like to help Patrick fight off Biden’s gun grab
today, please consider kicking in $35 to our cause. It will go a long
way toward protecting our freedoms!
Donate $35 to Help Defend America >>
http://tracking.teammorrisey.com/tracking/click?d=JH1zakVaNdTLlek_IjR2GmxiM-NqbvLOgWZBcu0Fsb3i96crsRA4ZSOY8TIz_J8x07CiWgVwmTAa3Ec0y-x6ayXXsj6wE5Uha8gvRQHjVyVC13GhJmeviK_SmMDhRseEY__ecl3PGeMzbOSTPTJcQ0ym6R1d0U1cbOnIpAcfX9-gfJ1S18mbR0lc57UiEAveXQ4rTtUvVndHw7awRDh06p8zvUopyM5fWiF3nKlqlIayfcNwSsj3PqNnHmB_It4-CRsUvpMDxDG7vwnPeKY3HR81

name: Moms for Remembrance
subject: #NeverAgain
body:
It is our duty to teach our children about the Holocaust to ensure that such evil and injustice will never happen to the Jewish people or any any other people ever again. Today we remember and recommit #neveragain. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27403659/279999589/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOTEzZjE3LWU3OTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9mwGz-AO3jmoENNaLToQfENmE75d1527eYngf-4RXWA=&emci=78373327-de98-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=22913f17-e798-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) **Yom HaShoah** On Holocaust Remembrance Day, we remember what happened and how it was allowed to happen. Hi Peter, As we pause today on Holocaust Remembrance Day to remember the 6 million Jews who were senselessly murdered by the Nazi regime and its collaborators, we remember our duty to keep the memory of survivors and victims alive. We remember to teach our children and the children of the world about one of the darkest moments in our history to ensure that such atrocities and injustices will never happen to the Jewish people or any other people again. Today, we remember what happened and how it was allowed to happen. The Holocaust began not with concentration camps, but with hateful rhetoric. **Peter, it started with words. Words of hate that transitioned to acts of persecution, violence, and genocide.** Antisemitism and hate are a persistent and rising threat in our country today. We must remember and honor the victims and survivors of the Holocaust and speak out against hatred of any kind today. **We recommit #NeverAgain.** [**If you are able to chip in today and recommit to this fight with me, please support the efforts of Moms Against Antisemitism and the work of the Jewish Democratic Council of America.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27403660/279999590/561362393?refcode=0408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOTEzZjE3LWU3OTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9mwGz-AO3jmoENNaLToQfENmE75d1527eYngf-4RXWA=) It is because of collaborations like this and supporters like you that we can continue the important work we do against antisemitism and hate of any kind. Sincerely, Simona Grace, Founder of Moms in Office [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27403661/279999591/561362393?refcode=0408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOTEzZjE3LWU3OTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9mwGz-AO3jmoENNaLToQfENmE75d1527eYngf-4RXWA=) | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27403662/279999592/328727808?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyOTEzZjE3LWU3OTgtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9mwGz-AO3jmoENNaLToQfENmE75d1527eYngf-4RXWA=&emci=78373327-de98-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=22913f17-e798-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) | clean_body: It is our duty to teach our children about the Holocaust to ensure that such evil and injustice will never happen to the Jewish people or any any other people ever again. Today we remember and recommit #neveragain. Yom HaShoah On Holocaust Remembrance Day, we remember what happened and how it was allowed to happen. Hi Peter, As we pause today on Holocaust Remembrance Day to remember the 6 million Jews who were senselessly murdered by the Nazi regime and its collaborators, we remember our duty to keep the memory of survivors and victims alive. We remember to teach our children and the children of the world about one of the darkest moments in our history to ensure that such atrocities and injustices will never happen to the Jewish people or any other people again. Today, we remember what happened and how it was allowed to happen. The Holocaust began not with concentration camps, but with hateful rhetoric. Peter, it started with words. Words of hate that transitioned to acts of persecution, violence, and genocide. Antisemitism and hate are a persistent and rising threat in our country today. We must remember and honor the victims and survivors of the Holocaust and speak out against hatred of any kind today. We recommit #NeverAgain. = It is because of collaborations like this and supporters like you that we can continue the important work we do against antisemitism and hate of any kind. Sincerely, Simona Grace, Founder of Moms in Office = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
